recommendation_map.G1: Add Product or Offer schema (JSON-LD) to the page.
recommendation_map.G2: Add missing required Product/Offer schema fields.
recommendation_map.G3: Ensure the page is indexable (no noindex, allow crawlers).
recommendation_map.G4: Add all Open Graph meta tags (og:title, og:image, og:description, og:type).
recommendation_map.G5: Fix URL hygiene: use clean, canonical URLs without session/tracking params.
recommendation_map.G6: Expose price and availability in machine-readable form (schema or meta).
recommendation_map.G7: Clarify variant selection (size, color) in schema or structured data.
recommendation_map.C1: Adjust the title to be between 40 and 140 characters for optimal AI discoverability.
recommendation_map.C2: Expand description with concrete specs and use-cases.
recommendation_map.C3: Complete required and recommended product attributes.
recommendation_map.C4: Show clear pricing (price, currency, availability) on the page.
recommendation_map.C5: Add shipping, returns, or policy information.
recommendation_map.C6: Add customer reviews or a rating widget to the product page.
recommendation_map.C7: Add support or trust signals (contact, guarantees, certifications).
recommendation_map.L1: Remove or clarify ambiguous terms that could confuse AI entity extraction.
recommendation_map.L2: Align brand/model/price entities between schema and visible content.
recommendation_map.L3: Add explicit Q&A or specs for compatibility, fit, and use-case queries.
recommendation_map.L4: Add verifiable specs and factual claims backed by structured data.
recommendation_map.U1: Ensure images have alt text and content is accessible to assistive tech.
recommendation_map.U2: Improve core discoverability (headings, breadcrumbs, clear structure).
recommendation_map.U3: Use higher-quality or properly sized images and media.
recommendation_map.U4: Ensure layout and text are readable on mobile (viewport, font size).
recommendation_map.F1: Populate all required Merchant feed fields.
recommendation_map.F2: Complete feed attribute coverage for required and recommended fields.
recommendation_map.F3: Fix feed validity (format, encoding, required fields).
recommendation_map.F4: Align feed data with page content (titles, prices, availability).
recommendation_map.F5: Keep feed updated (fresh availability and pricing).
